dresses.name: ZAYA
dresses.description:
ZAYA  Details:
• Summer-friendly maroon fabric
• Peach machine embroidery
• Short kurti paired with a farshi shalwar
• Elegant collar neckline with delicate embroidery on the sleeves and shalwar
• Subtle side panels for a graceful and modern look

dresses.name: PASHMINA
dresses.description:
Pashmina Details:

• Cotton and linen blend fabric – lightweight, breathable, and perfect for summer
• Elegant peach-toned design with delicate embroidery on the neckline, sleeves, and shalwar
• Short kameez paired with a stylish Pashmina shalwar for a graceful look

dresses.name: Zareen
dresses.description:
Zareen Details:

• Premium fabric with intricate machine embroidery on all four sides – neckline, sleeves, side slits, and hem
• Elegant black design featuring detailed traditional embroidery in a warm mustard/gold tone, with a decorative pendant accent at the neckline
• Long kameez paired with a plain black shalwar for a striking, timeless look
• Signature "4 Sides Embroidery" detailing for a rich, statement finish

dresses.name: LAYAL
dresses.description:
LAYAL Details:

• Leopard print fabric with a black and rust brown color combination
• Long kaftan-style kameez with a graceful silhouette
• Elegant stone work on the neckline and sleeves
• A timeless design that blends comfort with sophistication
